final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [2:0] count);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst)
            count <= 3'b000; // Synchronous reset
        else
            count <= count + 1; // Increment counter on each clock pulse
    end
endmodule
